coverage_note: The bundled APOE population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from APOE lipoprotein transport, cholesterol handling, remnant clearance, neuroinflammation, and amyloid/tau-associated brain lipid biology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000130203: APOE coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: APOE findings should be read against lipoprotein transport, cholesterol handling, remnant clearance, neuroinflammation, and amyloid/tau-associated brain lipid biology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

rs429358 is curated as a APOE marker for Alzheimer disease risk-modifier research, Lipid transport and cardiovascular traits; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

rs7412 is curated as a APOE marker for Alzheimer disease risk-modifier research, Lipid transport and cardiovascular traits; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
